# CWE-182 positive: filtering collapses input into privileged value
lang: go
file: CWE-182-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var stripNonAlnum = regexp.MustCompile(`[^a-zA-Z0-9]+`)

// CWE-182 Collapse of Data into Unsafe Value
// Vulnerable line: stripping symbols turns "--admin--" into "admin".
func AssignRole(c *gin.Context, roles map[string]bool) {
	role := c.PostForm("role")
	role = stripNonAlnum.ReplaceAllString(role, "")
	role = strings.ToLower(role)
	if !roles[role] {
		c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"role": role})
}
